sentences.english: My dream job would be to work for Bill Gates.
sentences.korean: 꿈의 직업은 빌 게이츠를 위해 일하는 거예요.

sentences.english: I really admire him because of his work in philanthropy, particularly his foundation's work in developing countries.
sentences.korean: 자선 활동, 특히 교육과 세계 보건 분야에서의 노력 때문에 정말 존경해요.

sentences.english: He's helped millions of people get access to education and healthcare.
sentences.korean: 수백만 명이 교육과 의료를 접할 수 있도록 도왔어요.

sentences.english: If I could work with someone like that, it would be very meaningful work.
sentences.korean: 그런 분과 함께 일할 수 있다면 정말 놀라울 거예요.

sentences.english: I would love to work for the United Nations.
sentences.korean: 유엔에서 일하고 싶어요.

sentences.english: I'm interested in international development and helping people around the world.
sentences.korean: 국제 개발과 전 세계 사람들을 돕는 것에 관심이 있어요.

sentences.english: The UN is an organization that has the ability to make real impact on global issues.
sentences.korean: 유엔은 글로벌 이슈에 진정한 영향을 줄 수 있는 조직이에요.

sentences.english: It would be incredible to be part of that.
sentences.korean: 그 일원이 될 수 있다면 정말 놀라울 거예요.

sentences.english: My dream job? Professional hockey player, NHL — National Hockey League.
sentences.korean: 꿈의 직업? 프로 하키 선수, NHL이요.

sentences.english: I love hockey, and being able to play at that level and make a good living doing it would be amazing.
sentences.korean: 하키를 정말 좋아하고, 그 수준에서 뛸 수 있다면 정말 놀라울 거예요.

quiz.question: What does '매력적인, 흥미로운' mean in English?

sentences.english: Plus the fame and travel that comes with it.
sentences.korean: 하키를 정말 좋아해요 그 수준에서 뛸 수 있다면 놀라울 거예요

sentences.english: I would like to work for a large mass-communication company.
sentences.korean: 대형 매스컴 회사에서 일하고 싶어요.

sentences.english: I'm interested in media and journalism.
sentences.korean: 미디어와 저널리즘에 관심이 있고, 그 분야에서 일하면 흥미로울 것 같아요.

sentences.english: I think it would be fascinating to work in an environment where we create content that reaches millions of people.
sentences.korean: 미디어와 저널리즘에 관심이 있어요

sentences.english: That's my dream job.
sentences.korean: 그 분야에서 일하면 흥미로울 것 같아요

quiz.question: What does '의미 있는' mean in English?

sentences.english: I want a job with a high salary and short working hours.
sentences.korean: 높은 연봉에 근무시간이 짧은 직업을 원해요.

sentences.english: Honestly, that's the main thing for me.
sentences.korean: 솔직히 그게 가장 중요해요.

sentences.english: I want to be able to earn good money but also have plenty of free time to do the things I enjoy outside of work.
sentences.korean: 좋은 돈을 벌면서 자유 시간도 갖고 싶거든요.

sentences.english: My dream job would be to work for a company related to snowboarding or winter sports.
sentences.korean: 꿈의 직업은 빌 게이츠를 위해 일하는 거예요.

sentences.english: I'm passionate about snowboarding, so it would be perfect to combine my passion with my work.
sentences.korean: 자선 활동, 특히 교육과 세계 보건 분야에서의 노력 때문에 정말 존경해요.

sentences.english: Whether that's designing snowboards, managing a snowboard company, or leading snowboarding tours.
sentences.korean: 스노보드를 디자인하든, 스노보드 회사를 관리하든, 스노보딩 투어를 이끌든요.
